nasb.text: For it is You who blesses the righteous man, O Lord, You surround him with favor as with a shield.

esv.text: For you bless the righteous, O Lord; you cover him with favor as with a shield.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！因為你必賜福給義人， 你要以恩惠像盾牌四面護衛他。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你必赐福给义人， 你的恩惠像盾牌四面保护他们。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，因为你必祝福义人， 你用恩典如盾牌围绕他！
